title: Spectrum Analyzer Concept
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: MicroPython and Physical Computing
description: Students can explain how an FFT converts a time-domain audio signal into a frequency-domain spectrum and identify what the bars in a spectrum analyzer represent.

educational.topic: Rotary Encoders, Touch Sensors, and Audio Input
learningObjectives: Students can explain how an FFT converts a time-domain audio signal into a frequency-domain spectrum and identify what the bars in a spectrum analyzer represent.
